creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
The netcat port leaves behind a directory that it should smoke
	at pkg_delete.

Fix: The following patches will

	a) Fix the PLIST with an @dirrm
	b) Teach the Makefile how to handle NOPORTDOCS

How-To-Repeat: 
	# Make sure NOPORTDOCS is not defined at make time
	cd /usr/ports/net/netcat
	make package
	pkg_delete -v netcat-1.10
	[ -d /usr/local/share/doc/netcat ] && echo See? Told ya.
